title: AIIMS Jodhpur – Project Research Scientist-I – 1 Posts
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical). Candidates with Post Graduate Degree Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 28-05-2026. For detailed information please visit AIIMS Jodhpur official website aiimsjodhpur.edu.in.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical). Candidates with Post Graduate Degree Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 28-05-2026. For detailed information please visit AIIMS Jodhpur official website aiimsjodhpur.edu.in.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Post Graduate Degree including the integrated PG degrees, Previous experience of at least five years for working in community-based projects with data collection, budget handling, and data management, Proficiency in Hindi, English and local language
